fullText: Hi, I'm Robert Curley, technical product marketing manager here at Sonar, and I'm going to show you in SonarCube Cloud how to enable architecture. First, sign into your account. Switch to your organization where you're an admin. You have to be an admin. Go to the administration section. Select architecture. You'll see this checkbox that you need to enable and save. And that's it.
